svg.title: Agentic Architecture Recommender — System Design
svg.desc: Three-wave execution model with coordinator, 8 specialist agents, and two-pass output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how the intake inference works in the new agentic recommender')
sendPrompt('What does the coordinator do in the new agentic recommender?')
sendPrompt('What does the Orchestration Architect agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Security Specialist agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Trust and Control Specialist agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Memory and State Architect agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Tool and Integration Specialist agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Economics Specialist agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Compatibility Validator agent check?')
sendPrompt('What does the Failure and Observability Specialist agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Skeptic agent do in the final review?')
sendPrompt('What does Pass 1 output contain in the new recommender?')
sendPrompt('How does the user trigger Pass 2?')

g.text: Full recommendation, ADRs, all agent detail
